attributes.content:
## Overview

The Brand Voice card gives the workspace a structured home for brand voice definition: tone, personality, do/don't, example phrases, and audience.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Brand Voice usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Brand Voice can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Brand Voice into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Skill Card]]** -- Skills can define how agents classify, write, or transform Brand Voice in repeatable ways.
- **[[Design System]]** -- Design System can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Brand Voice.
- **[[Coding Standard]]** -- Coding Standard can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Brand Voice.
- **[[Writing Style]]** -- Writing Style can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Brand Voice.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Brand Voice as the structured home for brand voice definition: tone, personality, do/don't, example phrases, and audience and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Brand Voice when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Brand Voice stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
